plan_scope: Internal governed swarm expansion for broader autonomous PM coverage behind the repo control surface.
mission_summary: Coordinate specialist personas across discovery, research, shaping, review, and validation so ProductOS can run broader autonomous PM missions without dropping PM gates or Ralph-loop discipline.

swarm_routes.objective: Route repeated or high-signal inputs into one bounded mission queue before downstream work starts.
swarm_routes.exit_condition: Only non-duplicate, explainable, and high-signal work reaches the active swarm mission queue.

swarm_routes.objective: Turn validated evidence into a PM-reviewable recommendation pack with explicit unresolved questions.
swarm_routes.exit_condition: The PM receives one reviewable package with clear evidence, recommendation, risks, and next action.

review_stack.trigger_condition: Any route that changes problem framing, recommendation posture, or release implication.
Any route that emits score-bearing artifacts or modifies control-surface state.
Any route that requests scope commitment, stakeholder communication, or release movement.

anti_loop_controls.duplicate_route_policy: Collapse duplicate work into the active route and update the shared rationale instead of opening a second mission.
anti_loop_controls.contradiction_escalation: Escalate conflicting recommendations to reviewer and PM gate before any route is allowed to advance.
anti_loop_controls.blocked_state_action: Pause the affected route, record the blocker, and emit one explicit PM-visible next action.

next_action: Keep the swarm internal, validate the route plan against the next-version runtime, and only broaden the claim after repeated outcome-review proof exists.
